title: OAP Events
description: Schema for domain events published by OAP-compliant services (io.oap.agents.events).

event.description: An immutable domain event published by an OAP-compliant service as the result of processing a command. CloudEvent 1.0 envelope — the type field identifies the domain fact (e.g. CounterProposed, OrderSubmitted), and source is the URI of the service that published it.

eventList.description: Response body for GET /events. Lists domain events published by this service.
